evidence.description: Daryoush Rezaei was shot dead on 23 July 2011. An Israeli intelligence source told Der Spiegel the operation was the first public operation by new Mossad chief Tamir Pardo; the campaign was initiated under Dagan's directorship and the institutional architecture he built. The killing occurred six months after Dagan left office.

editorial_notes: Rezaei was killed six months after Dagan left the Mossad directorship; the connection reflects the programme he designed and institutionalised. Attribution alleged. Pardo is more directly connected to this specific killing.
